examples: Being optimistic is not about being a Pollyanna and ignoring problems.
You don't have to be a Pollyanna, but try to perform one kindly act a week, choosing a different co-worker each time.
Drucker, who had escaped Germany in 1933, was no Pollyanna and no stranger to evil.
Mr. MARASH: I'd say what had surprised me - and I am by nature a Pollyanna - is how good we've been.
Pollyanna is a bitter, cynical spinster compared to Kurzweil.
